title: Justicia sisparensis
taxonomy: Justicia sisparensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This family consists of about 2,684 species of plants, commonly known as acanthus or thorny flower. The plant belongs to the genus Justicia, which includes around 630 species. Justicia sisparensis is a species endemic to India, found in the state of Sikkim. The exact classification of Justicia sisparensis is Justicia sisparensis is a member of the order Lamiales and class Magnoliopsida.
uses: Justicia sisparensis is known for its potential medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Traditional practices have utilized the plant for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Further studies are necessary to fully understand the plant's medicinal potential and its applications in traditional medicine.

intro: Justicia sisparensis is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae, commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various diseases such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections.
